complianceReview.title: Regulatory content — please have your compliance team review before publishing.
complianceReview.body: This template displays IRDAI broker/agent licence details, insurer comparisons, and claim-process descriptions. AI-generated copy in these sections is a starting draft only — the final wording must reflect your actual IRDAI registration, your actual partner insurers, and current IRDAI advertising guidelines for insurance intermediaries.

hint.label: Compare-and-buy promise
hint.description: Big friendly headline + a 'Get free quote' search widget on the right. The widget visually anchors the page — it's what visitors picture themselves using. Include your IRDAI licence in the eyebrow for trust.

fields.label: Eyebrow (IRDAI licence + tenure, e.g. IRDAI-licensed broker · serving since 2014)
Quote search card title
fields.placeholder: Get a free quote in 30 seconds

fields.label: Quote card fine-print
fields.placeholder: No obligation · No spam · No commission added

hint.label: Product grid
hint.description: Six insurance categories shown as friendly cards — Health, Motor, Term Life, Two-Wheeler, Home, Travel. Each card has a one-line tagline customers care about (e.g. 'Cashless at 8000+ hospitals').

fields.label: Section headline
fields.placeholder: Find the right cover for every life moment.

hint.label: Trust differentiators
hint.description: Four reasons customers should pick you over going direct to insurers — breadth of comparison, lowest prices, claim assistance, IRDAI-licensed. These reduce the 'why use a broker?' objection.

hint.label: Buy + claim journey
hint.description: Four steps from comparison to claim — Get quotes → Compare → Buy → Claim assistance. The final 'we help with claims' step is the differentiator vs. going to an insurer directly.

fields.label: Section headline
fields.placeholder: From quote to claim — we handle it all.

hint.label: The trust numbers
hint.description: Four big numbers — customers served, insurers on the platform, claim ratio, premium saved. Use specific, verifiable figures.

hint.label: List of IRDAI-licensed partners
hint.description: A scrolling strip of insurer names you compare across. All partners must be actual IRDAI-licensed insurers — listing carriers you don't work with is a regulatory issue.

hint.label: Real claim outcomes
hint.description: Quotes from real customers — especially those whose claims were processed. The 'product used' line shows specifics that sell credibility (e.g. 'Health · ₹8L cashless claim · 2024').

hint.label: The 'compare now' nudge
hint.description: Big friendly invitation to start the comparison flow. Action verbs ('Compare', 'Get Quote'), low-friction reassurance ('No obligation · 30 seconds').

fields.label: CTA headline
fields.placeholder: Get the right cover. In 30 seconds.

fields.label: Fine print under button
fields.placeholder: Free comparison · No obligation · IRDAI Lic. CB-XXX/2014
